title: F1 Prediction Engine
description: A triple-model ensemble predicting the 2026 Formula 1 era using XGBoost, Monte Carlo, and Bayesian belief updating.
longDescription: Built a predictive ecosystem combining XGBoost pattern recognition with a lap-by-lap physical simulation engine (Monte Carlo) to predict race outcomes under the massive 2026 regulatory reset. Engineered 26+ features including active aero flags and energy management split ratios.

title: LLM Multilingual Deficit
description: Researching the structural 'Token Tax' and fertility crisis that disadvantages non-English languages in global LLMs.
longDescription: Quantified the systematic disadvantage non-English scripts face in BPE-based tokenizers. Found that Kannada/Hindi require 3-5x more tokens for identical semantic content, inflating costs and shrinking effective context windows by ~70%.

title: Cartograph
description: An interactive data visualization platform that transforms raw datasets into cinematic 3D narratives.
longDescription: Applying Three.js and D3.js to turn complex CSVs into explorable 3D terrain maps with smooth camera-fly transitions and narrative overlays.
